svg.title: E-Learning Platform System Architecture
svg.desc: Full-stack architecture showing React frontend, API gateway, microservices, and databases

g.text: React Router · Redux Toolkit · React Query · Tailwind CSS · Socket.IO Client
Auth middleware · Rate limiting · Request routing · HTTPS/SSL · CORS · Load balancing
Docker · Nginx · GitHub Actions CI/CD · AWS / GCP · Cloudflare CDN · SSL

svg.text: Frontend: React 18, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Redux Toolkit, React Query, Socket.IO
Backend: Node.js + Express (REST) · Socket.IO (WebSocket) · Bull (Job queues)
Auth: JWT + Refresh tokens · Role-based access control (Student, Teacher, Admin)
Payments: Stripe or Paystack for subscription billing
Media: AWS S3 + CloudFront (or Cloudinary) for video streaming & file storage
Search: Elasticsearch or PostgreSQL full-text search for courses & content
Deploy: Docker containers · Nginx reverse proxy · CI/CD via GitHub Actions
